ogTitle: Macalister Range vs Macgregor: Climate Safety

heading: Macalister Range vs Macgregor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macalister Range, Queensland and Macgregor, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macalister Range has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Macgregor (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macalister Range or Macgregor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macalister Range has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Macgregor scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macalister Range scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Macgregor scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macalister Range or Macgregor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macalister Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
